common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to upload shipping proof (Only for TW and BR returns with is_seller_arrange = true). This is not to upload evidence for disputes.

error_list.name: returns.error_blank_tracking_no
error_list.description: Tracking Number field cannot be blank

error_list.name: returns.exceed_shipping_proof
error_list.description: Shipping Proof have already been uploaded

error_list.name: returns.error_filenumber
error_list.description: Number of image files exceeds three. Please only upload max three image files

error_list.name: returns.invalid_carrier_id

error_list.description: Reverse Logistics carrier name is a required parameter

error_list.name: returns.missing_image
error_list.description: Shipping Proof image is a required parameter

error_list.description: New seller arrange flow is not enabled

error_list.name: returns.error_tracking_no_alphanumeric
error_list.description: Tracking number should not contain special characters; for eg. !; @; $; %; &; *

error_list.name: returns.missing_return_sn
error_list.description: Return SN is a required parameter

error_list.name: returns.missing_carrier_id
error_list.description: Reverse Logistics carrier ID is a required parameter

error_list.name: returns.missing_tracking_no
error_list.description: Tracking Number is a required parameter

request_params.description: Unique ID of non-integrated reverse logistics channel used by seller.
request_params.name: reverse_logistics_carrier_id

request_params.description: Non-integrated reverse logistics channel name used by seller.
request_params.name: reverse_logistics_carrier_name

request_params.description: Tracking number used in seller arrange. Required when is_tracking_number_required = true in v2.returns.get_shipping_carrier.
request_params.name: tracking_number

request_params.description:
List of image_id of shipping proof image. Required when is_shipping_image_file_mandatory = true in v2.returns.get_shipping_carrier. Max: 3.

You can call the v2.media.upload_image to upload image and get the image_id, for this scenario, please pass the business = 2 and scene = 1.
request_params.name: image_id_list

response_params.description: Indicate error code if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. If success, return success
response_params.name: message
request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking
Detail informations you are querying. For this API will return null.
response_params.name: response

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/returns/upload_shipping_proof?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "image_id_list": [
        {
            "image_id": "-"
        }
    ],
    "remarks": "-",
    "return_sn": "-",
    "reverse_logistics_carrier_id": 0,
    "reverse_logistics_carrier_name": "-",
    "tracking_number": "-"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: Tracking Number is a required parameter
